{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322035902A2237C93946731C72D23"}"},"total":194},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7602742248615559961","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本综影视的小说真的是很过瘾，爽点满满，细节满满，文风细腻，适合改编成短剧和动漫，非常过瘾。最近在旅途，这本书一直陪伴我，谢谢作者大大的这么精彩的小说，我会继续追读的[爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心]加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770163030,"group_id":"7544711232054381630","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Rz9YDKIQDj6VxO9eUZgJE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704205&x-signature=yZBRyurrKDTyW8Ks9x781%2BPALhc%3D","user_id":"109676656989","user_name":"大马骝洲岛的比林"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109676656989","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1672489641,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7544711232054381630","book_info":{"abstract":"异世的灵魂，穿成异香无比的九瓣莲花，行走在电视剧中的各个小世界。她会逆转哪些人的命运，引发怎样的故事？
（金手指不定，私设比较多。）
1.三生三世十里桃花：玄女（日常温馨）
2.赴山海：秋水柔（给老大温暖的人生）
3.赴山海：若柳扶风（愿像风一样自由自在）
4.知否：墨兰（炮灰逆袭）
5.甄嬛：浣碧（花为自己开）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2obd02957214b68ca76eb9ea4d86adb455~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"弯豆角","author_id":"","book_id":"7544711232054381630","book_name":"综影视：美人你好香","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1015,"name":"女频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1015&name=女频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7544712570653901374","read_count":"14688","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"494885"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"245","tags":"女频衍生,幻想言情,穿越,同人,综影视,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2obd02957214b68ca76eb9ea4d86adb455~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779307142&x-signature=NsDL5VCovqswU5woYTER5ph24Ks%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110822091305","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"375"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322035902A2237C93946731C72D23"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读46小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"fo rwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":26033,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":52112,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3234},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1760888774,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7565434758455313214","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"小说开篇既以“美人”定调，意难平以强化悬念抓住人心，全书权谋与对决双线并进，尤以“暖心”写得荡气回肠。并非简单的力量堆砌，而是一场集心理博弈、战术奇谋、人多面的考验与自然力量与一体的画卷。人物弧光充足，主角的塑造堪称精妙。情感拉满。情节环环相扣，伏笔千里。深谋远虑，每一处转折都既出人意料，又在情理之中。书中立场与形势下的艰难抉择。总而言之作者文风大气与诗意的灵动。作品的文学与艺术感染力。这本小说不仅是一部反转点密集、节奏紧张的暖心文！","text_exts":[{"e":16,"s":13,"text":"意难平","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%84%8F%E9%9A%BE%E5%B9%B3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177412314231C72D23%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227565434758455313214%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227544711232054381630%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%84%8F%E9%9A%BE%E5%B9%B3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761468085,"group_id":"7544711232054381630","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3RR62TEMYS33bGo9L6NqzHl7XFQcrZzSmB7eWFwRj0R","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6ed6e9c7eb42472e875c9352d7d67a44~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701948&x-signature=OLkDNj26KPTu1UTm6xGO%2FIfAntk%3D","user_id":"3006516564604986","user_name":"问这天下谁是英雄"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3006516564604986","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"
